task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Downtown Penthouse in Nashville TN (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $3200000.00 and wholesale is $2560000.00. Product features: 3-bedroom penthouse with wraparound terrace and city views. Reference: https://www.villagerealestate.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Downtown Penthouse in Nashville TN. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Downtown Penthouse in Nashville TN. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
